title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: Nvidia's Pixel Diffusion (PiD) is an open-source AI model for generating high-resolution 4K images. The video demonstrates PiD workflows in ComfyUI, comparing it to alternatives like SeedVR2 and integration with other tools like Z-image turbo.
